app.title: Kie AI Desktop
app.startingSidecarHint: First launch may take 1–2 minutes. Please keep the window open.
app.sidecarTimeoutHint: Restart the app. If it keeps failing, reinstall from the latest release.

apiKey.banner: Connect your kie.ai API key to use models and generate content.
apiKey.invalidKey: Your API key is invalid or expired. Update it in Settings.
apiKey.networkBlocked: Could not verify the API key. Check your network or proxy in Settings.
apiKey.modelsLocked: Models are unavailable until you add a working API key in Settings.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Chat with AI models, generate images and videos — all through kie.ai in one desktop app.
onboarding.apiKeyBody: Get your key at kie.ai and paste it in Settings. Without a key, models and generation stay locked.
onboarding.readyBody: Pick a tab — Chats, Images, or Video — and start creating. You can change theme and proxy anytime in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyDeleteConfirm: Remove the stored API key? Models and generation will be locked until you add a new key.

shortcuts.hint: Keyboard shortcuts work inside the app window.

backup.description: Export chats, settings and generation metadata. Restore after reinstall or on another PC.
backup.noApiKey: API keys are not included in backups (they stay in Windows Credential Manager).
backup.includeMediaWarning: Large archive — images and videos can take significant disk space.
backup.importSuccess: Backup restored. Restart may be required for some data.
backup.importConfirmMessage: Current database will be replaced. This cannot be undone.

chats.emptyState: Select a chat or create a new one
chats.welcomeHint: Pick a model and create your first chat
chats.errorSidecar: Service unavailable. Restart the app or click Retry.
chats.errorNoModels: Chat models failed to load. Restart the app.
chats.folderDeleteConfirm: Delete folder? Chats will remain without a folder.

images.emptyGallery: No images yet. Create your first!
images.errorSidecar: Service unavailable. Restart the app or click Retry.
images.errorUnknown: Could not download the image. Check proxy in Settings and try again.

video.emptyGallery: No videos yet. Create your first!
video.errorSidecar: Service unavailable. Restart the app or click Retry.
video.errorUnknown: Could not download the video. Check proxy in Settings and try again.

audio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the music (simple mode) or enter lyrics (custom mode)…
audio.stylePlaceholder: Genre, mood, instruments — e.g. indie folk, acoustic guitar
audio.emptyGallery: No tracks yet. Create your first!
audio.errorSidecar: Service unavailable. Restart the app or click Retry.
audio.errorUnknown: Could not download the audio. Check proxy in Settings and try again.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.network: Check network or proxy in Settings.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.hint: Describe what you want to generate. Be specific about style, subject, and mood.

negative_prompt.label: Negative prompt
negative_prompt.hint: What to avoid in the image: artifacts, blur, unwanted objects, etc.

aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.hint: Shape of the output frame. Match your target platform (e.g. 16:9 for landscape video).

resolution.label: Resolution
resolution.hint: Output size. Higher resolution costs more credits and takes longer.

nsfw_checker.label: Content filter
nsfw_checker.hint: When enabled, unsafe content is filtered before you see the result.

output_format.label: File format
output_format.hint: PNG supports transparency; JPEG produces smaller files.

quality.label: Quality
quality.hint: High outputs 4K images; Basic is faster and cheaper.

image_urls.label: Source image
image_urls.hint: Upload the image to animate. Required for image-to-video models.

input_urls.label: Reference images
input_urls.hint: Optional reference images (0–2) to guide style or composition.

sound.label: Sound
sound.hint: Generate audio track together with the video.

duration.label: Duration
duration.hint: Length of the video in seconds. Longer clips cost more credits.

fixed_lens.label: Fixed lens
fixed_lens.hint: Keeps the camera static without simulated camera movement.

generate_audio.label: Generate audio
generate_audio.hint: Add a synchronized audio track to the video. Increases generation cost.

first_frame_url.label: First frame
first_frame_url.hint: Optional starting image for image-to-video. Leave empty for text-only generation.

last_frame_url.label: Last frame
last_frame_url.hint: Optional ending image for first-and-last-frame video generation.

image_url.label: Image URL
image_url.hint: Paste a URL or upload an image file.

reference_image_urls.label: Reference images
reference_image_urls.hint: Optional reference images to guide style, subject, or composition.

enable_pro.label: Quality mode
enable_pro.hint: When enabled, prioritizes output quality over speed.

cfg_scale.label: CFG scale
cfg_scale.hint: How closely the model follows your prompt (0–1). Higher = stricter adherence.

style.label: Style
style.hint: Visual style preset for the generation.

web_search.label: Web search
web_search.hint: Allow the model to use online search for richer context.

instrumental.label: Instrumental
instrumental.hint: Generate music without vocals. Turn off to include singing (custom mode uses prompt as lyrics).

custom_mode.label: Custom mode
custom_mode.hint: Advanced mode: set genre (style), track title, and lyrics in prompt. Requires style and title.

title.label: Track title
title.hint: Song title shown in results (required in custom mode, max 80 characters).

negative_tags.label: Negative tags
negative_tags.hint: Styles or elements to avoid, e.g. heavy metal, autotune, drums.

upload_url.label: Audio upload URL
upload_url.hint: Public URL of the audio file (upload via Kie file API first).

audio_url.label: Audio URL
audio_url.hint: Public URL of the source audio file.

audio_id.label: Audio ID
audio_id.hint: ID of the track from a previous Suno generation result.

task_id.label: Task ID
task_id.hint: Task ID from the original Suno generation.

voice.label: Voice
voice.hint: Preset voice name (e.g. Rachel, Adam) or ElevenLabs voice ID.

content.label: Style description
content.hint: Describe the music style to enhance.

tags.label: Style tags
tags.hint: Genre and mood tags for instrumental generation.

name.label: Persona name
name.hint: Display name for the generated persona.

description.label: Persona description
description.hint: Describe the vocal character and style.

default_param_flag.label: Use original parameters
default_param_flag.hint: When enabled, style, title, and continue_at are required.

continue_at.label: Continue at (seconds)
continue_at.hint: Timestamp in the source track where extension should begin.

vocal_gender.label: Vocal gender
vocal_gender.hint: Preferred vocal gender for the extension.

type.label: Separation type
type.hint: separate_vocal — vocals + instrumental; split_stem — individual stems.

vocal_start.label: Vocal start (seconds)
vocal_start.hint: Start of the vocal segment used for persona.

vocal_end.label: Vocal end (seconds)
vocal_end.hint: End of the vocal segment used for persona.
